title: Hyperdrive Design Division
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hyperdrive Design Division''' was a division of the [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] that specialized in [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]]. [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] was head of it for a while.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
